title: Back Pain Remedies for Older Adults: 11 Herbal Tinctures
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures, also known as ginger tincture, may help with back pain due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and ease pain in the muscles and joints. The tincture contains compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which are responsible for its pain-relieving effects. When taken, these compounds work by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the body, thus reducing pain and discomfort. If you're considering using Zingiber officina...
